content_body: We had a wonderful weekend on are couples trip.  You did think of all the little things and that means alot.  We were able to relax, laugh, and tell stories around the fire.  Oh, and don't forget the HOT TUB!  Everyone had a great time!  Thanks again for a great weekend.  P.S.  The "Treehouse"  was perfect for the Ladies Only tea party.  We called it "Tea in the Tree".  Thank you!
title: Couples Weekend in Blue Ridge, GA
